title: Emitever 68211 Heavy Duty Strong Double Sided Tape - 15mm x 8.2m - Low Temperature Operation, Waterproof Acrylic Foam 1.1mm Thick, For Automotive, Panel Mounting, Decoration,Grey
features: Strong Adhesion of Multiple Surfaces: 8.2m x 15mm x 1.1mm (27ft x 0.59inch x 0.04inch). The strong double-sided adhesive has excellent initial and lasting adhesion on metal, plastic and glass surfaces. Depending on the surface material, it can withstand a force of about 14-28N/cm, which is suitable for the firm fixation of nameplates, light strips, panels, boxes, etc.

Extreme Environment Resistance: It can be used indoors and outdoors. This double-sided tape can withstand high temperatures up to 200°C and low temperatures of -45°C, and has excellent moisture resistance and UV aging resistance, ensuring stable performance in harsh environments or long-term outdoor use, and is not easy to fall off or fail.

Efficient Foam Structure: The strong tape uses a 1.1mm thick gray acrylic foam substrate, which has both an adhesive layer and a support layer, effectively resisting static shear forces while providing a buffering and sealing effect.

Easy to Peel Off Without Leaving Traces: The PE-coated release paper is designed to be easy to peel off by hand; in addition, no residual adhesive traces will be left when the tape is removed, keeping the surface clean.

Wide Range of Applications: No nails, no liquid adhesives, double-sided foam tape is suitable for home decoration, industrial fixation, advertising installation, car repair, electronic equipment assembly and other scenarios, meeting the bonding and installation needs of different fields, with good practicality.
description: Product Description Product Features: • Suitable for low temperature operation • Good bonding on various substrates Previous page Next page Example mounting applications include but are not limited to: • Decorative glass panel mounting • Plastic panel mounting • Nameplate and parts mounting • TV back panel mounting
